creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 225777
Patch for FLAVOR support of graphics/opencv

Is this the spearhead of opencv maintenance?

This requires FLAVOR support as %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%% appears in pkg-plist.
The package name is changed by USE_PYTHON=optsuffix when it is not the default python version. (See databases/rrdtool, multimedia/openshot, etc.)
This includes an update to 4.5.2 (which I need right away), so if you use this as-is, you'll need to do some more work here.
